历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 8430 → 9853 → 8177 → 9206 → 10382, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2200 positions in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 10382.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 198 in 2021, 184 in 2022, 172 in 2023, 170 in 2024, and 172 in 2025, remaining stable in the 170–172 range in recent years; the 2026 plan is 167, a decrease of 5 from 2025, with a slight reduction in enrollment leading to slightly increased competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is 48th, stable in the 44–53 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of normal universities nationwide, with comprehensive strength widely recognized; the 2026 reputation evaluation is relatively positive, with high popularity among master's applicants (planned enrollment of 3100, estimated applications exceeding 15,000), reflecting sustained social recognition; Douyin popularity ranking is 67th (comprehensive popularity about 460,000), at an average level; no obvious enrollment gaps or negative public records; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Marxist Theory A+, Education A+, World History A+, Statistics A, Ecology A-, Biology A-, totaling 6 A-class disciplines; among them, Statistics A is directly related to Mathematics and Statistics majors in Physics Category, and Biology A- matches Biological Science majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Class was highly recommended in 2023 (82.69) → recommended in 2024 (67.80), though cooling down, still popular; Electronics/Communication was highly recommended in 2024 (76.86), Electrical Engineering and Automation was highly recommended in 2024 (74.28), engineering majors overall have high popularity; the total number of provincial examinees in 2026 is about 110,868, estimated at about 80,000 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 72.2%, a slight decrease from 2025 (80,400), easing competition pressure; Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, a provincial ministry-affiliated normal university, with a relatively large enrollment scale in Physics Category in the province (about 167–198 in recent years), local candidates have strong willingness to apply, and regional preference is stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking backward trend, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, positive university reputation, persistently high popularity of engineering majors, and a slight decrease in the number of provincial Physics Category examinees, based on the 2025 baseline of 10382, the ranking is expected to move slightly forward (competition slightly intensifies but the decrease in examinees offsets); the predicted minimum ranking is about 10151, with a range of 9651–10651.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 9651–10651, it is recommended to mainly fill Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 experimental classes and Computer Class as reach goals, and use Tier 3 majors as safety choices; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 9500), focus on reaching for Tier 1 Lu Jiaxi Experimental Class and popular majors like Computer Class; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., around 10500), use Tier 3 majors such as Economics Class and Business English as safety choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1184 → 1368 → 1100 → 1536 → 1386, showing an overall fluctuating and shifting backward trend, with a fluctuation range of about 400 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1386; the provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 96 in 2021, 91 in 2022, 85 in 2023, 84 in 2024, and 78 in 2025, showing a year-on-year decreasing trend; the 2026 plan is 77, a further reduction of 1 compared to 2025, and the continuous enrollment reduction slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking was 49th in 2021 → 44th in 2022 → 53rd in 2023 → 46th in 2024 → 45th in 2025 → 48th in 2026, stabilizing in the 45–53 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of normal universities nationwide; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is relatively positive, with high popularity among master's applicants (planned enrollment of 3100, estimated applications exceeding 15,000), reflecting sustained social recognition; Douyin popularity ranking is 67th (comprehensive popularity about 460,000), which is average, with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment interruption records; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Marxist Theory A+, Education A+, World History A+, Statistics A, Ecology A-, Biology A-, a total of 6 A-level disciplines, among which Marxist Theory, Education, and World History are A+, highly matching the university's normal enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of normal/education majors was recommended (70.76) in 2022 → differentiated and wait-and-see (63.81) in 2023 → differentiated and wait-and-see (55.84) in 2024, with a slight cooling in recent years but overall stable; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 110,868, estimated at about 30,800 based on the recent History Category proportion of about 27.8%, a slight decrease from 2025 (31,100), slightly easing competition pressure; Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, as a provincial ministry-affiliated normal university, with a relatively large enrollment scale in the province (about 77–96 in recent years for History Category), and local candidates have a strong willingness to apply, with stable regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the fluctuating and shifting backward trend of historical rankings, the continued slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the positive school reputation but slightly cooling popularity of normal majors, and the slight decrease in the number of History Category candidates in the province, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward based on the 2025 baseline of 1386; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1390, with a range of 1140–1640.
